verse_text: And Jesus answered and said to him, 'It has been said, 'You shall not tempt the LORD your God.' '

links.context: St. Michael the Archangel would not dispute with the devil over the body of Moses, but said, "The Lord rebuke you" (Jude 9). Even more astoundingly, Jesus Christ (the Lord) says, "The Lord rebukes you." This is fulfilled in the temptation of Christ, when He relies upon the written word of Holy Scripture rather than His own power as Son of God to rebuke Satan and resist temptation ([[MAT.4:1]]-11; [[MRK.1:12]], [[MRK.1:13]]; [[LUK.4:1]]-13).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
